utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Guess who here . It is the toughest guy in toy land , Ben . Real American hero . I am G . I . Joe !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: G . I . Joe ? Do you really think he is gonna fall for that ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look Ben , it is a toy that protects U . S . oil interests overseas !
